name: Ossy Dermawan

name: Ismail
evidence: Sekjen Kementerian Komunikasi dan Digital. Career civil servant since 1993. ITB graduate. No party affiliation.

name: Rionald Silaban
evidence: Dirjen Kekayaan Negara Kemenkeu. No party affiliation or TKN role found.

name: Yohanes Surya
evidence: Renowned physicist, physics olympiad coach. No party links. Resigned Nov 2025.

name: Deswandhy Agusman
evidence: Career finance professional. Chairman of Yayasan Prabowo Subianto — significant political link despite no formal party membership.

name: Bambang Suswantono
evidence: Letjen TNI Mar (Purn). Former Danpaspampres, Irjen TNI, Irjen Kemenhan/ESDM. No party affiliation found.

name: Condro Kirono
evidence: Wakil Ketua TKN Prabowo-Gibran Pilpres 2024. Komjen Pol Purn. Appointed Pertamina commissioner June 2024.

name: Sondaryani
evidence: Oil industry professional. Former Ketua Ikatan Alumni Perminyakan Trisakti. No direct political evidence.

name: Iggi H. Achsien
evidence: Finance/banking professional. MBA ITB. No party links found.

name: Alexander Lay
evidence: One of 10 lawyers who defended Jokowi in 2019 pilpres court case. Former Stafsus Mensesneg. Appointed Pertamina commissioner 2017.

name: Burhanuddin Abdullah
political_affiliation: Partai Gerindra + TKN Prabowo-Gibran (Ketua Dewan Pakar)
evidence: Ketua Dewan Pakar TKN Prabowo-Gibran. Ketua Dewan Pakar Partai Gerindra. Former Gubernur BI. Appointed PLN Komut July 2024.

name: Aminuddin Ma'ruf
evidence: Wakil Sekretaris TKN Prabowo-Gibran. Founder Samawi (relawan Jokowi 2019). Now Wakil Kepala BP BUMN + PLN Commissioner.

name: Dadan Kusdiana
evidence: Career bureaucrat at Kementerian ESDM. Removed from Sekjen by Prabowo Sep 2025.

name: Jisman Parada Hutajulu
evidence: Career bureaucrat at ESDM. Removed from Dirjen by Prabowo Sep 2025.

name: Bambang Eko Suhariyanto
evidence: Marsda TNI Purn. Staf Ahli Menhan Prabowo. Wamensesneg Kabinet Prabowo. Listed in TKD Prabowo-Gibran Jatim. Rangkap as PLN commissioner.

name: Yazid Fanani
evidence: Retired Inspector General of Police. No direct political party or TKN links found.

name: Mutanto Juwono
evidence: Marsma TNI Purn. Anggota Bapanas Prabowo-Sandi 2019. Now PLN Independent Commissioner.

name: Andi Arief
evidence: Ketua Bappilu DPP Demokrat. Resigned from Bappilu after PLN appointment. Demokrat was part of KIM supporting Prabowo-Gibran.

name: Yuliot
evidence: Career teknokrat at BKPM since 1988. Wamen ESDM in Kabinet Prabowo. No party affiliation.

name: Mia Amiati
evidence: Retired Kajati Jatim Mar 2025. Appointed Mandiri commissioner Mar 2025. Rumored connection to Jaksa Agung. Media describes as 'jatah' appointment.

name: Zulkifli Zaini
evidence: Career banker since 1983. Mantan Dirut Bank Mandiri (2010-2013), Dirut PLN (2019-2021). No party membership found.

name: B. Bintoro Kunto Pardewo
evidence: Career Bank Indonesia official. Former Komisaris Danareksa. No party affiliation.

name: Kartika Wirjoatmodjo
evidence: Part of TKN Jokowi-Ma'ruf 2019. Wamen BUMN under Jokowi and Prabowo. Listed as 'Relawan Jokowi yang Jadi Menteri-Komisaris BUMN'.

name: Parman Nataatmadja
evidence: Career banker (BCA, BRI Syariah, PNM). No party membership or relawan role found.

name: Awan Nurmawan Nuh
evidence: Former Irjen Kementerian Keuangan. Career bureaucrat. No party affiliation.

name: Helvi Yuni Moraza
evidence: Former Sekjen DPP Partai Gerindra. Now Wamen UMKM in Kabinet Prabowo. Summoned to Prabowo's Kertanegara for cabinet selection.

name: Edi Susianto
evidence: Career Bank Indonesia official since 1993. No party affiliation.

name: Lukmanul Khakim
evidence: Ketua DPP PKB Bidang Perdagangan. Former DPRD DKI Jakarta. Cawagub Jatim 2024. Described as 'anak buah Cak Imin'. Labeled Independent Commissioner despite clear PKB ties.

name: Angga Raka Prabowo
political_affiliation: Partai Gerindra (Wasekjen) + TKN Prabowo-Gibran (Direktur Media Kampanye)
evidence: Kader Gerindra since 2008. Wasekjen DPP Gerindra. Direktur Media Kampanye TKN Prabowo-Gibran 2024. Sekretaris pribadi Prabowo (2014-2017). Now Wamen Komdigital + Komut Telkom.

name: Silmy Karim
evidence: Dirut Krakatau Steel, Dirjen Imigrasi, Wamen Imipas. No formal party membership. Recently became KPK tersangka, dismissed by Prabowo June 2026.

name: Suahasil Nazara
evidence: Professor Economics FEB UI. Wamenkeu since 2019 (Jokowi and Prabowo). Non-partisan technocrat.

name: Nezar Patria
evidence: Career journalist (Tempo), activist (Reformasi 1998, Kontras). Wamenkominfo/Komdigital. No party membership.

name: M. Rudy Salahuddin Ramto
evidence: Sekretaris Kementerian Investasi/BKPM. Career bureaucrat. No party affiliation.

name: Luky Alfirman
evidence: Career Kemenkeu official. Former Dirjen Anggaran. Described as 'anak buah Sri Mulyani'. No party affiliation.

name: Dony Oskaria
evidence: Career at CT Corp. Wamen BUMN, COO Danantara, Kepala BP BUMN. Explicitly described as 'profesional murni, bukan kader partai'.

name: Mochamad Iriawan
evidence: Komjen Pol Purn. Joined Gerindra April 2023. Wakil Ketua Dewan Pembina DPP Gerindra. Ran as DPR candidate 2024 (failed). Appointed Komut Pertamina Nov 2024.

name: Rizal Mallarangeng
political_affiliation: Partai Golkar (former Waketum) + Chairman Yayasan Prabowo
evidence: Former Waketum DPP Golkar. Chairman Yayasan Prabowo Subianto Djojohadikusumo since 2022. Reclassified from Independen to Komisaris in June 2026 RUPST.
